Video.summary: Our favorite hands and moments featuring the Poker Brat, Phill Hellmuth. Featuring Phil Hellmuth, Brad Garrett, Matt Glantz, Liv Boeree, Rep Porter, Jennifer Tilly, Greg Mueller, Dan Shak.
